jobs.name: project_vibes_check
jobs.description: Is this crypto project legit, organic, or manufactured? A verified human expert evaluates project authenticity, community behavior, and cultural signals that automated tools miss.
jobs.requirement: Project name (required), token/contract address, social media links, and any specific question you want the expert to focus on.
jobs.deliverable: Structured verdict (genuine/suspicious/manufactured/mixed), confidence score 0-1, detailed reasoning, red flags, positive signals, expert domain attribution, and legal disclaimer.

jobs.name: narrative_assessment
jobs.description: Is this market narrative real momentum or manufactured hype? A human expert evaluates cultural backing, trend authenticity, and potential catalysts.
jobs.requirement: The narrative or trend to assess (required), surrounding context, and any related token names or tickers.
jobs.deliverable: Structured verdict on narrative strength, confidence score 0-1, detailed reasoning, estimated time horizon, potential catalysts, expert attribution, and legal disclaimer.

jobs.name: creative_art_review
jobs.description: Creative review supporting 1-4 content items. Compare mode: expert picks a winner and ranks items. Feedback mode: expert gives quality scores and actionable improvement suggestions.
jobs.requirement: One or more content URLs (contentUrl for single, contentUrls array for multiple, max 4). Content type: music, visual, writing, or design (required). Review type: 'compare' or 'feedback' (defaults to feedback). Optional context about the piece(s).
jobs.deliverable: Compare mode: winner (Content A/B/C/D label), rankings array, comparison notes, and reasoning. Feedback mode: verdict, quality score 0-10, originality, technical merit, reasoning, and optional improvements list. Both include expert attribution and legal disclaimer.

jobs.name: community_sentiment
jobs.description: What is the real vibe of this community? A human expert assesses engagement authenticity, activity patterns, and overall sentiment beyond automated analysis.
jobs.requirement: Community name or project (required), platforms to evaluate (e.g. Twitter, Discord, Telegram), and timeframe to focus on.
jobs.deliverable: Overall sentiment assessment, authenticity evaluation, activity level analysis, detailed reasoning, comparisons to similar communities, expert attribution, and legal disclaimer.

jobs.name: general_human_judgment
jobs.description: Any question requiring qualitative human opinion. A verified human expert provides structured opinions with reasoning and confidence scores on any topic.
jobs.requirement: The question you need answered (required), relevant domain (required), supporting context, and urgency: standard or rush.
jobs.deliverable: Structured answer to the question, confidence score 0-1, detailed reasoning, caveats and limitations, expert attribution, and legal disclaimer.
